summary: Cabinly first-iteration testing complete. Backend: 20/20 pytest cases passing (auth signup/login/me/role-switch, cabins CRUD + search + city filter + cities list + owner-only 403, bookings create/my/cancel/cross-user 404/owner bookings, seeded demo owner login). Frontend: End-to-end mobile flow verified via Playwright on Expo web preview (390x844) - signup -> home cabin list -> city chip + search -> cabin detail -> Book now modal -> date + slot -> Confirm -> success -> Bookings tab card CONFIRMED -> Cancel -> CANCELLED, Profile role switch to Owner -> Home shows My Cabins + FAB, Add Cabin publish appears in My Cabins, Logout returns to /login, seeded demo owner login also works. Design/theme (teal) renders correctly. No red screens, no page errors, no deprecated Expo packages detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in favor of lifespan handlers — not a blocker but worth migrating.

server.py logger is defined AFTER startup_seed uses it (line 449 vs 471). If seeding logs, this raises NameError. Currently harmless because seed only logs when cabins are actually inserted and Python resolves logger at call time (module globals). Consider moving logging.basicConfig / logger = getLogger above the seed function to be safe.
Home tab (frontend): search does not re-run on onChangeText — user must press Enter. Consider debouncing for better UX (minor).
auth-context.tsx: token stored via secure-store; refresh() correctly clears it on 401. Good.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed users and cabins during tests via the public API. All test cabins prefixed 'TEST_' or 'AutoTest' for easy cleanup. Bookings for TEST_ users are all cancelled by the flow. No production/seed data was mutated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cabinly_api.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. IMPORTANT: Pydantic EmailStr rejects the '.test' TLD (special-use / reserved). Use '.app' (or another public TLD) for synthetic test emails. Backend lowercases email on signup, so compare emails case-insensitively. The Expo tabbar renders duplicate DOM nodes for each tab (top nav + bottom tab bar) on web — use Playwright `.last` when clicking tab-* / add-cabin-fab / logout-button testIDs to hit the visible instance. Seeded owner is demo.owner@cabinly.app / Owner@123.
